topic: Top 5 greatest underdog stories in football

data.cta_english: Was Hazard's goal the real title decider? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: This club was bottom of the table in April because they only won four games early.
segments.subtitle_english: This club was bottom of the table in April because they only won four games early.
segments.voice_hindi: यह क्लब अप्रैल में तालिका में सबसे नीचे था क्योंकि उन्होंने शुरुआत में केवल चार गेम जीते थे।

segments.voice_english: Famous pundits predicted immediate relegation after Claudio Ranieri took over this struggling squad in July.
segments.subtitle_english: Famous pundits predicted immediate relegation after Claudio Ranieri took over this struggling squad in July.
segments.voice_hindi: जुलाई में क्लाउडियो रानिएरी द्वारा इस संघर्षरत टीम को संभालने के बाद प्रसिद्ध पंडितों ने तत्काल पदावनति की भविष्यवाणी की।

segments.voice_english: Managers ignored N'Golo Kante before Leicester bought him for just five million pounds in August.
segments.subtitle_english: Managers ignored N'Golo Kante before Leicester bought him for just 5000000 pounds in August.
segments.voice_hindi: अगस्त में लीसेस्टर द्वारा एन'गोलो कांटे को केवल पांच मिलियन पाउंड में खरीदने से पहले प्रबंधकों ने उन्हें नजरअंदाज कर दिया था।

segments.voice_english: Jamie Vardy scored in eleven consecutive games when he faced Manchester United in November.
segments.subtitle_english: Jamie Vardy scored in eleven consecutive games when he faced Manchester United in November.
segments.voice_hindi: जेमी वर्डी ने नवंबर में मैनचेस्टर यूनाइटेड का सामना करते हुए लगातार ग्यारह मैचों में स्कोर किया।

segments.voice_english: Eden Hazard scored a late equalizer against Spurs, so Leicester officially won the Premier League title.
segments.subtitle_english: Eden Hazard scored a late equalizer against Spurs, so Leicester officially won the Premier League title.
segments.voice_hindi: ईडन हैज़र्ड ने स्पर्स के खिलाफ देर से बराबरी का स्कोर बनाया, जिससे लीसेस्टर ने आधिकारिक तौर पर प्रीमियर लीग का खिताब जीता।

data.youtube_title: Leicester City Ka Miracle Aur 5 Insane Football Stories! 🤯
title_options: Leicester City Ka Miracle Aur 5 Insane Football Stories! 🤯
Leicester City Aur 5 Teams Ne Kaise Kiya Football Shock? 🏆
5 Football Miracles Jo Leicester City Se Bhi Bade Hain? 🤔
data.description: Leicester City ka wo 2016 ka miracle toh yaad hi hoga, jab unhone poori duniya ko shock kar diya tha! 🏆 But kya aapko pata hai ki football history me isse bhi bade underdogs rahe hain? Ranieri ki prediction se lekar Kante ke saste transfer tak, sab dekhlo. Aapka sabse favourite underdog moment kaunsa hai? Comment me batao! 👇
